Crisis Type: Member posts sexually explicit content in general channel
Response Protocol: 1. Delete the post immediately. 2. Ban the member permanently. 3. Post a brief public note that content was removed for violating guidelines. 4. DM affected members who saw it (if identifiable). 5. Log incident with timestamp and action taken. 6. Team debrief within 24 hours.
Communication Channel: #announcements for public note. DMs for affected members. Internal chat for team debrief.

Crisis Type: Moderator accused of abusive behavior toward a member
Response Protocol: 1. Suspend moderator's privileges pending investigation. 2. DM the affected member for full details within 2 hours. 3. Review all moderator interactions in the past 7 days. 4. Interview other mods. 5. Make a decision within 48 hours. 6. Communicate outcome to both parties separately.
Communication Channel: DM with affected member. Private mod channel for investigation. #announcements only if a public statement is needed.

Crisis Type: Members organizing a mass exodus to a competing community
Response Protocol: 1. Identify leaders of the exodus — do not confront publicly. 2. DM top-engaged members individually to understand grievances. 3. Address legitimate complaints publicly with a concrete action plan. 4. Do not badmouth the competing community. 5. Run a retention campaign for remaining members.
Communication Channel: DMs to engaged members. #announcements for action plan. Private mod channel for strategy.

Crisis Type: Server or platform outage during a paid event
Response Protocol: 1. Post immediate acknowledgment on your status page and social channels. 2. Send email to all event registrants with ETA and apology. 3. Reschedule or extend the event window. 4. Offer compensation (extended access, partial refund, or bonus content). 5. Post post-mortem within 1 week.
Communication Channel: Email blast to members. Social media (Twitter/LinkedIn). Community #announcements. Event page.

Crisis Type: Member threatens legal action against the community or its leadership
Response Protocol: 1. Do not respond to the threat directly. 2. Do not delete any related content. 3. Escalate to legal counsel immediately. 4. Suspend the member's account pending resolution. 5. Preserve all related logs and messages. 6. Only communicate through legal counsel from this point.
Communication Channel: Legal counsel only. No public communication until legal advises otherwise.

Crisis Type: Negative public post about the community goes viral on Twitter/LinkedIn
Response Protocol: 1. Assess the post — is it valid criticism or bad-faith attack? 2. If valid, reply publicly acknowledging the issue and sharing your plan to fix it. 3. If bad-faith, do not engage publicly. 4. Rally your champions to share their genuine positive experiences (do not script them). 5. Monitor sentiment for 48 hours.
Communication Channel: Reply publicly on the same platform. Internal team coordination via private chat. Community #announcements as needed.

Response Protocol: 1. Acknowledge the error immediately in #announcements and email. 2. Pause all billing processes. 3. Issue refunds within 24 hours — no questions asked. 4. Add a credit or free month as a goodwill gesture. 5. Send personal apology email from the founder. 6. Publish post-mortem with root cause and prevention plan.
Communication Channel: Email blast to all affected members. #announcements in community. Individual apology emails for top-tier members.

Crisis Type: A community member passes away unexpectedly
Response Protocol: 1. Confirm the facts with a trusted source (family member or close friend). 2. Post a respectful tribute in a dedicated thread. 3. Offer the channel as a space for members to share memories. 4. Check in privately with close community friends. 5. Respect the family's privacy wishes. 6. Do not speculate or share unconfirmed details.
Communication Channel: Dedicated tribute thread in community. DMs to close community friends. #announcements for factual notice only.

Crisis Type: Spam bot swarm floods all public channels
Response Protocol: 1. Enable slow mode in all public channels. 2. Activate bot captcha on join. 3. Mass-ban identified bot accounts (IP-based when possible). 4. Clean up all spam messages. 5. Post update in #announcements explaining what happened and what's been done.
Communication Channel: #announcements for member update. Internal mod channel for cleanup coordination.

Crisis Type: Founder or lead CM announces departure from the community
Response Protocol: 1. Plan the transition message carefully — do not post emotionally. 2. Announce the departure with a thank-you message highlighting what's next for the community. 3. Introduce the replacement or interim lead immediately. 4. Hold a town hall or AMA within 1 week. 5. Reassure members about continuity of programs and events.
Communication Channel: #announcements for departure message. Town hall / live stream for Q&A. Email for paid members.

Crisis Type: Doxxing or harassment incident targeting a member
Response Protocol: 1. Delete the doxxing/harassment content immediately. 2. Permanently ban the perpetrator. 3. DM the targeted member offering full support. 4. Offer to assist with platform reporting if the member chooses. 5. Update security settings to prevent recurrence. 6. Post a brief community-wide statement reinforcing anti-harassment policy.
Communication Channel: DM with targeted member. #announcements for policy reinforcement. Private mod channel for investigation.
